sourceAmbiguity: Real provider configuration could be blocked until live credentials exist.
decisionTaken: Shipped a local configuration twin, control board, selector manifest, harness, and Playwright spec that run without credentials.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The shared contract requires mock-first and gated-live external configuration tasks.
operationalRisk: If removed, provider readiness becomes manual and untestable until late onboarding.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Keep the mock twin in lockstep with any future provider-console selector changes.
